rationale: The onboarding API, UI client types, dashboard wiring, and documentation are tightly coupled.
Bundled execution avoids conflicts in ui/src/lib/adminApi.ts and ui/src/components/admin/AdminDashboard.tsx.
Separate review is required because the work touches persistence, auth-adjacent admin routes, and first-run Docker UX.

evidence: RED: npx vitest run tests/contract/admin-onboarding-api.test.ts failed with expected 404s before implementation.
GREEN: npx vitest run tests/contract/admin-onboarding-api.test.ts passed: 3 tests.
Manual review-style diff audit found no P0/P1/P2 issues; dedicated /codex review hook unavailable in this tool surface, so independent review remains pending for draft PR.
RED: npm run test --prefix ui -- AdminOnboarding.test.tsx AdminAuth.test.tsx failed before implementation with missing AdminOnboarding module and absent automatic onboarding screen.
GREEN: npm run test --prefix ui -- AdminOnboarding.test.tsx AdminAuth.test.tsx passed: 19 tests.
Regression: npm run test --prefix ui -- AdminOnboarding.test.tsx AdminAuth.test.tsx AdminConfig.test.tsx AdminBackup.test.tsx AdminMaintenance.test.tsx AdminOps.test.tsx passed: 66 tests.
Manual review-style diff audit found no P0/P1/P2 issues; dedicated /codex review hook unavailable in this tool surface, so independent review remains pending for draft PR.
README and Admin Help document server-side onboarding resume and warn not to use docker compose down -v because it removes pgdata.
npm run build --prefix ui passed with existing Vite large-chunk warning.
Manual review-style diff audit found no P0/P1/P2 issues; dedicated /codex review hook unavailable in this tool surface, so independent review remains pending for draft PR.

monitoring.fallbackPrompt: Run wdd-run-work for WORK-admin-onboarding-flow. Read state.json and task files, inspect active worker or PR references, update gates, and stop when tasks are ready for wdd-finish-work.
